items.final_wording: Supports documenting diabetes type, care provider, last review, HbA1c, current medicines and devices, BMI, blood pressure, kidney function, comorbidities, and diabetes complications at referral.

source.title: Guideline for Perioperative Care for People with Diabetes Mellitus Undergoing Elective and Emergency Surgery
source.population: People with diabetes mellitus undergoing elective or emergency surgery, with adult-focused pathways and separate paediatric requirements.
source.setting: Primary-care referral, surgical consultation, preoperative assessment, hospital admission, perioperative care, discharge, and follow-up.
source.exclusions: Exact for clinician-documented diabetes type, recent review, HbA1c, medicines and devices, BMI, blood pressure, renal function, comorbidities, complications, and an individualized shared perioperative plan. Medicine changes and doses are not mapped; UAE pathways remain local.
source.evidence_paraphrase: Supports documenting diabetes type, care provider, last review, HbA1c, current medicines and devices, BMI, blood pressure, kidney function, comorbidities, and diabetes complications at referral.

items.rationale: The exact CPOC section supports documenting diabetes type, recent review, medicines and devices, HbA1c, BMI, blood pressure, renal function, comorbidity, and complication context.

items.final_wording: Supports clinician review of diabetes, comorbidities, relevant results, medication reconciliation, and a patient-involved individualized perioperative plan without generating medicine changes or doses.

source.title: Guideline for Perioperative Care for People with Diabetes Mellitus Undergoing Elective and Emergency Surgery
source.population: People with diabetes mellitus undergoing elective or emergency surgery, with adult-focused pathways and separate paediatric requirements.
source.setting: Primary-care referral, surgical consultation, preoperative assessment, hospital admission, perioperative care, discharge, and follow-up.
source.exclusions: Exact for clinician-documented diabetes type, recent review, HbA1c, medicines and devices, BMI, blood pressure, renal function, comorbidities, complications, and an individualized shared perioperative plan. Medicine changes and doses are not mapped; UAE pathways remain local.

exact_location.heading: Recommendations for surgical outpatients and preoperative assessment

source.evidence_paraphrase: Supports clinician review of diabetes, comorbidities, relevant results, medication reconciliation, and a patient-involved individualized perioperative plan without generating medicine changes or doses.

items.rationale: The preoperative section supports recording an individualized clinician-agreed plan and patient involvement but does not support medicine changes or doses.
